$comment: Config-as-code INTENT for the finance_report OpenPanel product-analytics views (D / EPIC-024). OpenPanel exposes NO write API/MCP for funnels or dashboards (only event /track + read), so this file is the reviewable source of truth for the baseline funnel + events board, and the SOP-006 runbook in docs/ssot/platform.openpanel.md is the manual apply (OpenPanel UI). Event names MUST match the FE taxonomy ANALYTICS_EVENTS in apps/frontend/src/lib/analytics.ts and the BE emitter src/analytics.py. Querying these on-demand is automatable via the OpenPanel MCP / openpanel_query.py CLI (SOP-004/SOP-005).

funnels.name: Upload → Report
funnels.description: Core activation funnel: a user uploads a statement and reaches a generated report package.

events_board.name: Key product events
events_board.description: At-a-glance counts/trends of the canonical event taxonomy, broken down by deployment.environment.
